subject: Action needed: mainecoon planning in Wellington | Nikola Tesla | Q1 review | INIT-1117
body: Following yesterday's call, the mainecoon effort in Wellington needs prompt confirmation. Current status is review with monthly updates owned by delivery. Review dependencies across operations and flag unresolved risks. Confirm owners for each work package and share ETA by end of day. Pablo Picasso seems to disagree with Nikola Tesla on key points due to historical perspectives. Reference initiative INIT-1117. Please add your comments before tomorrow morning. Tracking tags: planning, coordination.
